name: Folder Input
description: Scans a folder and outputs a list of files matching the specified patterns.
doc:
Scan a folder and get a list of matching files.

Pattern Examples:
• *.png, *.jpg - image files
• *.txt, *.md - text files
• * - all files

Output Format:
Array of file info objects containing:
• path - full file path
• name - filename with extension
• nameWithoutExt - filename without extension
• ext - file extension

Use with Loops:
Connect to Loop Start to process each file. Use file info properties in File Write templates.

inputs.name: Path
inputs.description: Optional dynamic path from another node

properties.name: Folder Path
properties.description: Path to the folder to scan

properties.name: Include Patterns
properties.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for files to include

properties.name: Max Files
properties.description: Maximum number of files to return
